puzzleActivity5Label.desc: Title of the Colour Calm mindful activity (tapping expanding circles).

puzzleActivity5Desc.en: Tap the expanding circles and let your mind follow.
puzzleActivity5Desc.desc: One-line description of the Colour Calm activity on the activity grid.

puzzleActivity5Duration.desc: Approximate duration label for the Colour Calm activity.

puzzleHomeTitle.desc: Header title on the Calm Activities home/grid screen.

puzzleHomeSubtitle.en: Short exercises to calm and refocus
puzzleHomeSubtitle.desc: Subtitle under the Mindful Activities header.

puzzleCountdownIntro.en:
Counting backwards by 3 interrupts anxiety
and brings you into the present.
puzzleCountdownIntro.desc: Intro text on the Slow Count activity explaining the technique. Keep the line break.

puzzleCountdownDone.desc: Shown in the center circle when the Slow Count countdown reaches zero.

puzzleCountdownRestart.desc: Instruction shown after the Slow Count is finished; tapping restarts it.

puzzleCountdownSubtract.desc: Instruction during the Slow Count; each tap subtracts 3 from the number.

puzzleGratitudePrompt0.en: Something in nature I noticed today…
puzzleGratitudePrompt0.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt1.en: A person who has shown me kindness…
puzzleGratitudePrompt1.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt2.en: A simple pleasure I often overlook…
puzzleGratitudePrompt2.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt3.en: Something my body does for me every day…
puzzleGratitudePrompt3.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt4.en: A memory that still makes me smile…
puzzleGratitudePrompt4.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt5.en: Something I've learned in the past year…
puzzleGratitudePrompt5.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt6.en: A challenge that made me stronger…
puzzleGratitudePrompt6.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt7.en: A small comfort that I appreciate…
puzzleGratitudePrompt7.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt8.en: Someone who believed in me when I didn't…
puzzleGratitudePrompt8.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt9.en: A moment of peace I've experienced…
puzzleGratitudePrompt9.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt10.en: A skill or talent I'm glad I have…
puzzleGratitudePrompt10.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt11.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt12.en: A kindness I showed someone recently…
puzzleGratitudePrompt12.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt13.en: Something that made me laugh recently…
puzzleGratitudePrompt13.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleGratitudePrompt14.en: A place that brings me peace…
puzzleGratitudePrompt14.desc: Gratitude reflection prompt (sentence starter). Keep the trailing ellipsis.

puzzleReflectionHint.desc: Placeholder/hint text in the gratitude reflection text field.

puzzleShufflePrompt.desc: Button label that picks a new random gratitude prompt.

puzzleMemoryMoves.desc: Live counter of moves taken in the Memory Match game.

puzzleNewGame.desc: Button label to start a fresh Memory Match game.

puzzleWellDone.desc: Congratulations heading shown when the Memory Match game is won.

puzzleCompletedInMoves.en: {count, plural, =1{Completed in 1 move} other{Completed in {count} moves}}
puzzleCompletedInMoves.desc: Shown after winning Memory Match, reporting how many moves it took.

puzzlePlayAgain.desc: Button label to replay the Memory Match game after winning.

puzzleStrengthIntro.en: How strong does each feel today? This is just for you — there's no right answer.
puzzleStrengthIntro.desc: Intro instructions for the Strength Compass self-rating activity.

puzzleStrength0.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength1.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength2.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength3.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength4.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength5.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength6.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrength7.desc: Name of a personal strength rated on a 1–5 slider in Strength Compass.

puzzleStrengthRating.desc: Numeric rating display next to each strength slider, e.g. 3/5.

puzzleStrengthAffirmation.en: Wherever you rated yourself today — you showed up. That alone is strength.
puzzleStrengthAffirmation.desc: Encouraging closing message at the bottom of the Strength Compass screen.

puzzleNowStep0Title.desc: Step 1 title of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleNowStep0Body.en: Look around you right now. Name 3 things you can see without judging them. Just see them as they are.
puzzleNowStep0Body.desc: Step 1 body of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleNowStep1Title.desc: Step 2 title of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleNowStep1Body.en: Place both feet flat on the floor. Feel the weight of your body. Notice one sensation in your body right now — warmth, tension, breath.
puzzleNowStep1Body.desc: Step 2 body of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleNowStep2Title.desc: Step 3 title of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleNowStep2Body.en: You have arrived in this moment. What is one small, kind thing you can do for yourself in the next 10 minutes?
puzzleNowStep2Body.desc: Step 3 body of the Now Moment grounding exercise.

puzzleComplete.desc: Button label on the final step of the Now Moment exercise; finishes and returns.

puzzleColorIntro.en: Tap anywhere. Breathe with the circles.
puzzleColorIntro.desc: Instruction text under the Colour Calm header.

puzzleColorTapAnywhere.desc: Ambient hint shown centered in the empty Colour Calm canvas before any taps.
